requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (IMANOR NM adopting IEC 60598-1 vs CN GB 7000.1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（IMANOR NM 采用 IEC 60598-1 vs 中国 GB 7000.1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（IMANOR NM 採用 IEC 60598-1 vs 中國 GB 7000.1）

summary.en: General LED luminaires placed on the Moroccan market must meet the safety requirements of the applicable IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests). Core requirements cover protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation resistance, touch current), thermal protection, mechanical strength, and wiring terminals — designed for Morocco's 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase grid. Conformity is demonstrated through test evidence to the NM/IEC 60598-1 standard from an accredited laboratory and is reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process, with the in-country importer acting as the responsible party. This is the lighting analogue of the EU LVD route, but delivered via a conformity attestation rather than a self-declared CE DoC.
summary.zh: 在摩洛哥市场销售的通用 LED 灯具须满足采用 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）的适用 IMANOR NM 标准的安全要求。核心要求涵盖防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热保护、机械强度及接线端子——按摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 单相电网设计。符合性通过来自认可实验室、依据 NM/IEC 60598-1 标准的检测证据证明，并在工业部进口符合性/认证流程内审查，由在摩进口商作为责任方。这是欧盟 LVD 路径的照明对应，但通过符合性认证交付，而非自我声明的 CE 符合性声明。
summary.zht: 在摩洛哥市場銷售的通用 LED 燈具須滿足採用 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）的適用 IMANOR NM 標準的安全要求。核心要求涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱保護、機械強度及接線端子——按摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 單相電網設計。符合性通過來自認可實驗室、依據 NM/IEC 60598-1 標準的檢測證據證明，並在工業部進口符合性/認證流程內審查，由在摩進口商作為責任方。這是歐盟 LVD 路徑的照明對應，但通過符合性認證交付，而非自我聲明的 CE 符合性聲明。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests
Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process for regulated electrical products (luminaire safety evidence reviewed within it)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; the edition change moved the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T, but CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules rather than the GB/T designation alone. GB 7000.1 derives from IEC 60598-1, so the technical base is shared with the Moroccan NM standard. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories; the CCC certificate and GB test reports are issued in the Chinese framework and are not the Moroccan attestation deliverable.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；换版将标识由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T，但范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。GB 7000.1 源自 IEC 60598-1，故技术基础与摩洛哥 NM 标准共享。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行；CCC 证书及 GB 检测报告在中国框架下出具，并非摩洛哥认证交付物。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；換版將標識由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T，但範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。GB 7000.1 源自 IEC 60598-1，故技術基礎與摩洛哥 NM 標準共享。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行；CCC 證書及 GB 檢測報告在中國框架下出具，並非摩洛哥認證交付物。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; aligned with IEC 60598-1)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both the Moroccan NM standard and CN GB 7000.1 derive from IEC 60598-1, and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid is similar to China's domestic supply (China's three-phase nominal is 380 V, but single-phase lighting is 220 V / 50 Hz), so the safety technical base and supply assumptions are largely harmonized. Gaps: (1) the Moroccan deliverable is conformity to the applicable NM standard presented through the in-country importer within the import-conformity attestation process — a CCC certificate is not accepted; (2) test reports should be from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab and confirmed as accepted by the conformity body; (3) any national deviations in the adopted NM edition, and pollution-degree / creepage assumptions, should be checked against the version in force; (4) the importer is the responsible party for attestation and customs clearance at Casablanca / Tanger Med. Existing CN test data may reduce re-testing but the conformity attestation must be assembled to the Moroccan process.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥 NM 标准与中国 GB 7000.1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，且 220 V / 50 Hz 单相电网与中国民用供电相似（中国三相标称为 380 V，但单相照明为 220 V / 50 Hz），故安全技术基础及供电假设基本协调。差距：（1）摩洛哥的交付物是经在摩进口商、在进口符合性认证流程内提交的对适用 NM 标准的符合性——CCC 证书不被接受；（2）检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并确认为合格评定机构所接受；（3）所采纳 NM 版本的任何国家偏差，以及污染等级/爬电距离假设，应对照现行版本核查；（4）进口商是认证及在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港清关的责任方。现有中国检测数据可减少重新检测，但符合性认证须按摩洛哥流程组装。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥 NM 標準與中國 GB 7000.1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，且 220 V / 50 Hz 單相電網與中國民用供電相似（中國三相標稱為 380 V，但單相照明為 220 V / 50 Hz），故安全技術基礎及供電假設基本協調。差距：（1）摩洛哥的交付物是經在摩進口商、在進口符合性認證流程內提交的對適用 NM 標準的符合性——CCC 證書不被接受；（2）檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並確認為合格評定機構所接受；（3）所採納 NM 版本的任何國家偏差，以及污染等級/爬電距離假設，應對照現行版本核查；（4）進口商是認證及在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港清關的責任方。現有中國檢測數據可減少重新檢測，但符合性認證須按摩洛哥流程組裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where regulated — conformity to the IEC 60598-1-based NM standard is reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process via the in-country importer before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard moved from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] General LED luminaires for Morocco must meet an IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 60598-1, with conformity reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process via the in-country importer. The safety base is largely harmonized with CN GB 7000.1 and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid is similar to China, so CN test data may be reusable — but a CCC certificate is not the Moroccan deliverable. Provide ILAC-recognised NM/IEC 60598-1 evidence, check the in-force NM edition for any deviations, and arrange attestation via the importer before port clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向摩洛哥的通用 LED 灯具须满足采用 IEC 60598-1 的 IMANOR NM 标准，符合性在工业部进口符合性/认证流程内、经在摩进口商审查。安全基础与中国 GB 7000.1 基本协调，220 V / 50 Hz 单相电网与中国相似，故中国检测数据可能可复用——但 CCC 证书并非摩洛哥交付物。请提供 ILAC 认可的 NM/IEC 60598-1 证据，核查现行 NM 版本的任何偏差，并经进口商在口岸清关前办理认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向摩洛哥的通用 LED 燈具須滿足採用 IEC 60598-1 的 IMANOR NM 標準，符合性在工業部進口符合性/認證流程內、經在摩進口商審查。安全基礎與中國 GB 7000.1 基本協調，220 V / 50 Hz 單相電網與中國相似，故中國檢測數據可能可複用——但 CCC 證書並非摩洛哥交付物。請提供 ILAC 認可的 NM/IEC 60598-1 證據，核查現行 NM 版本的任何偏差，並經進口商在口岸清關前辦理認證。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (IMANOR NM adopting IEC 61347-2-13 vs CN GB 19510.14)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（IMANOR NM 采用 IEC 61347-2-13 vs 中国 GB 19510.14）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（IMANOR NM 採用 IEC 61347-2-13 vs 中國 GB 19510.14）

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) intended for the Moroccan market should meet the safety requirements of the applicable IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), together with the general controlgear requirements of IEC 61347-1. The standard covers isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking. Where the driver is sold as a separate product (not integrated into the luminaire), its safety conformity should be addressed in its own right within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process via the in-country importer; when integrated, the driver evidence forms part of the luminaire safety file (see ledma-safety-01). Drivers must suit the Moroccan 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase supply.
summary.zh: 面向摩洛哥市场的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）应满足采用 IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）的适用 IMANOR NM 标准的安全要求，并配合 IEC 61347-1 的控制装置通用要求。该标准涵盖绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标志。当驱动器作为独立产品销售（未集成于灯具内）时，其安全符合性应在工业部进口符合性流程内、经在摩进口商单独处理；当集成时，驱动器证据构成灯具安全文件的一部分（见 ledma-safety-01）。驱动器须适配摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 单相供电。
summary.zht: 面向摩洛哥市場的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）應滿足採用 IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）的適用 IMANOR NM 標準的安全要求，並配合 IEC 61347-1 的控制裝置通用要求。該標準涵蓋絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標誌。當驅動器作為獨立產品銷售（未集成於燈具內）時，其安全符合性應在工業部進口符合性流程內、經在摩進口商單獨處理；當集成時，驅動器證據構成燈具安全文件的一部分（見 ledma-safety-01）。驅動器須適配摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 單相供電。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules
IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 61347-1 — Lamp controlgear — Part 1: General and safety requirements

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), aligned with IEC 61347-2-13, with the general controlgear requirements in GB 19510.1. CCC certification may apply to LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. The technical base is shared with the Moroccan NM standard, but the CCC certificate and GB 19510.14 test reports are issued in the Chinese framework and are not the Moroccan attestation deliverable.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐，通用控制装置要求见 GB 19510.1。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。技术基础与摩洛哥 NM 标准共享，但 CCC 证书及 GB 19510.14 检测报告在中国框架下出具，并非摩洛哥认证交付物。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊，通用控制裝置要求見 GB 19510.1。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。技術基礎與摩洛哥 NM 標準共享，但 CCC 證書及 GB 19510.14 檢測報告在中國框架下出具，並非摩洛哥認證交付物。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)
GB 19510.1 — Control gear for lamps — Part 1: General and safety requirements

gap.en: GB 19510.14 and the Moroccan NM standard both derive from IEC 61347-2-13, so the driver safety technical content is largely harmonized and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply is similar to China's domestic supply. Gaps: (1) for standalone drivers, conformity to the applicable NM standard must be addressed within the Moroccan import-conformity process via the in-country importer — a CCC certificate is not the deliverable; (2) test reports should be from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab and confirmed as accepted by the conformity body; (3) CCC in China is power-range dependent, so confirm whether the specific driver's power/voltage range was certified, and whether the Moroccan conformity scope treats the driver as a regulated product on its own; (4) integrated drivers fold into the luminaire safety file (ledma-safety-01); (5) the in-country importer is the responsible party for attestation and port clearance at Casablanca / Tanger Med.
gap.zh: GB 19510.14 与摩洛哥 NM 标准均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，故驱动器安全技术内容基本协调，220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电与中国民用供电相似。差距：（1）对于独立驱动器，对适用 NM 标准的符合性须在摩洛哥进口符合性流程内、经在摩进口商处理——CCC 证书并非交付物；（2）检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并确认为合格评定机构所接受；（3）中国 CCC 视功率范围而定，故请确认具体驱动器的功率/电压范围是否已认证，以及摩洛哥符合性范围是否将驱动器视为独立受管制产品；（4）集成驱动器并入灯具安全文件（ledma-safety-01）；（5）在摩进口商是认证及在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港清关的责任方。
gap.zht: GB 19510.14 與摩洛哥 NM 標準均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，故驅動器安全技術內容基本協調，220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電與中國民用供電相似。差距：（1）對於獨立驅動器，對適用 NM 標準的符合性須在摩洛哥進口符合性流程內、經在摩進口商處理——CCC 證書並非交付物；（2）檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並確認為合格評定機構所接受；（3）中國 CCC 視功率範圍而定，故請確認具體驅動器的功率/電壓範圍是否已認證，以及摩洛哥符合性範圍是否將驅動器視為獨立受管制產品；（4）集成驅動器並入燈具安全文件（ledma-safety-01）；（5）在摩進口商是認證及在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港清關的責任方。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where regulated — for standalone LED drivers, conformity to the IEC 61347-2-13-based NM standard is addressed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process via the in-country importer; integrated drivers fold into the luminaire safety file
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14-2014 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED drivers for Morocco should meet an IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13 (with IEC 61347-1). Standalone drivers are addressed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process via the in-country importer; integrated drivers fold into the luminaire safety file. The base is largely harmonized with CN GB 19510.14 and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply is similar to China, so data may be reusable — but a CCC certificate is not the Moroccan deliverable. Provide ILAC-recognised NM/IEC evidence and confirm the driver's regulated scope and power range with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向摩洛哥的 LED 驱动器应满足采用 IEC 61347-2-13（配合 IEC 61347-1）的 IMANOR NM 标准。独立驱动器在工业部进口符合性流程内、经在摩进口商处理；集成驱动器并入灯具安全文件。基础与中国 GB 19510.14 基本协调，220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电与中国相似，故数据可能可复用——但 CCC 证书并非摩洛哥交付物。请提供 ILAC 认可的 NM/IEC 证据，并向进口商确认驱动器的受管制范围及功率范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向摩洛哥的 LED 驅動器應滿足採用 IEC 61347-2-13（配合 IEC 61347-1）的 IMANOR NM 標準。獨立驅動器在工業部進口符合性流程內、經在摩進口商處理；集成驅動器並入燈具安全文件。基礎與中國 GB 19510.14 基本協調，220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電與中國相似，故數據可能可複用——但 CCC 證書並非摩洛哥交付物。請提供 ILAC 認可的 NM/IEC 證據，並向進口商確認驅動器的受管制範圍及功率範圍。
